g.text: Slip into the Gallery of Gems.
Study the big central gem case.
Follow the faint beeping toward a panel.
Read the little card that fell behind.
Follow the symbol to the corridor.
Pry up the loose skirting board.
Duck behind a plinth as the guard passes...
Freeze in the open and hope.
Trace the wall map of the old museum.
Follow the draught to the hall.
Take the arrow's direction to the hall.
Grab the display torch and press on.
Duck under the rope into the dark galler...
Push into the unlit back stacks.
Follow the card into the stacks.
Reach into the gap behind the books.
Feel along the shelf for a lantern.
Keep going blind into the dark.
Try the key on the founder's study door.
Try it on the sealed display cabinet.
Try it on the locked service stairs.
Carry the notebook to the reading table.
Take the cipher wheel to the table.
Spread the ledger on the reading table.
Steady it before the glass cracks.
Settle in to read the code.
Check the cupboard at the base.
Take the chart up to the reading table.
Read the first line of the cipher.
Head to the Astronomy Hall the cipher na...
Take the marked door to the rotunda.
Climb higher into the dark dome.
Follow the ticking to the gear room.
Time your steps past the pendulum.
Rush across before it swings back.
Follow the passage to the rotunda.
Align the clockwork globe to the cipher.
Search the pedestal for a hidden panel.
Slip into the night-guard's records room...
Set the rings exactly as decoded.
Start over and decode it properly.
Follow the draught to the side door.
Call home from the museum desk.
Keep the letter safe and leave the rest.
Read the catalogue to the end.
Carry the whole truth up into the mornin...
Slip out with the letter and a plan.
Follow the map to the walled-up wing.
Keep tracing it as the sky greys.
Bring the lost wing to light.
Keep it a secret with your friends.
Leave it for the museum to find.
Seal the secret with a promise.
Leave the clue and slip away.
Slip it in your bag and run.
Set it back where it belongs.
Reach the hall with the bells ringing.
